action.reasoning: Observation: Best test worst_region_accuracy is 0.4651 (iter 9, 20 epochs with mixup, EMA, cap 10x). Iter 11 with lower LR was worse (0.4489). Africa is consistently the worst region (~0.45 vs 0.65+ for others). Analysis: Key improvements needed: (1) Increase Africa weight cap from 10x to 25x to boost Africa performance, (2) Replace mixup with CutMix for better regularization, (3) Stronger augmentation (GaussianBlur, solarization, more aggressive crop), (4) Snapshot ensembling in predict.py. Keep proven LR (2e-5 backbone, 5e-4 head). 18 epochs fits within ~2.3h budget. Decision: Train with improved settings and submit eval.
